before_snippet:
- name: Run tests
  run: pnpm test --passWithNoTests
after_snippet:
- name: Run tests
  timeout-minutes: 15
  run: pnpm -r --workspace-concurrency=2 test --passWithNoTests

- name: Diagnose test failure
  if: failure()
  run: |
    nproc
    lscpu
    free -h
    ps -eo pid,ppid,stat,etime,%cpu,%mem,wchan:32,comm --sort=-%cpu

commands.command: timeout --signal=TERM --kill-after=10s 600s mise exec node@24.16.0 -- pnpm -r --workspace-concurrency=2 test --passWithNoTests
commands.observed: 30 workspace projects completed; final examples/invoice-triage passed 23 tests in 19.86s

unknowns: The original live CI hang root cause remains unresolved.

workflow diff changes only Run tests and following diagnostic steps
